work_scope: Load a boiler at your location in Lakemore, OH.
scope_items:
Shoemaker Rigging would provide the equipment, labor and transportation for
the above referenced project;
Shoemaker Rigging would load a boiler and haul away;
Shoemaker Rigging has not included any utility disconnect or installation.
project_conditions:
This project is based upon the scope of work listed above. Any work beyond this scope must be approved, in writing, and signed by the
owner or their designated representative. Clear access for cranes, equipment, and labor to all working areas is required. Removal of any
obstruction is the responsibility of the owner. It is assumed that all aprons, driveways, hard-surfaced areas and plant floors are adequate
for the necessary loads - static or moving - for all machinery and equipment used on this project. Delays due to non-Shoemaker Rigging
arranged transportation could incur additional charges.
terms: Net 30 days. Proposal good for 60 days.
